languages.text: "Тау-Фи-0098 когда-то начинал свой путь как приписанный в {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Астра Милитарум{/g} специалист. Подлагаю, именно это наложило на него свой отпечаток. С тех пор все его исследования сконцентрированы на борьбе против природы и тварей различных планет и биомов. Он стремится расширить жизненное пространство Человечества, так что его работа скорее утилитарна".

traits.locale_text: "Тау-Фи-0098 когда-то начинал свой путь как приписанный в {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Астра Милитарум{/g} специалист. Подлагаю, именно это наложило на него свой отпечаток. С тех пор все его исследования сконцентрированы на борьбе против природы и тварей различных планет и биомов. Он стремится расширить жизненное пространство Человечества, так что его работа скорее утилитарна".

languages.text: "Tau-Phi-0098 once began his journey as a specialist assigned to the {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g}. I suppose that is what left its mark on him. Since then, all of his research has focused on combatting nature and the creatures of various planets and biomes. He is seeking to expand Humanity's habitable space, so his work is practical in nature."
languages.original_text: "Тау-Фи-0098 когда-то начинал свой путь как приписанный в {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Астра Милитарум{/g} специалист. Подлагаю, именно это наложило на него свой отпечаток. С тех пор все его исследования сконцентрированы на борьбе против природы и тварей различных планет и биомов. Он стремится расширить жизненное пространство Человечества, так что его работа скорее утилитарна".

traits.locale_text: "Tau-Phi-0098 once began his journey as a specialist assigned to the Astra Militarum. I suppose that is what left its mark on him. Since then, all of his research has focused on combatting nature and the creatures of various planets and biomes. He is seeking to expand Humanity's habitable space, so his work is practical in nature."

Since then, all of his research has focused on combatting nature and the creatures of various planets and biomes. He is seeking to expand Humanity's habitable space, so his work is practical in nature."

Since then, all of his research has focused on combatting nature and the creatures of various planets and biomes. languages.text: 「タウ・フィ・0098はかつて、{g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}アストラ・ミリタラム{/g}に配属された専門家として旅を始めた。それが彼に刻まれたものだ。それ以来、彼の研究は、あらゆる惑星の自然や生物群系と戦うことに集中している。人類の居住可能な空間を拡大しようとする彼の仕事は、実用的なものだ」
languages.original_text: "Tau-Phi-0098 once began his journey as a specialist assigned to the {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g}. I suppose that is what left its mark on him. Since then, all of his research has focused on combatting nature and the creatures of various planets and biomes. He is seeking to expand Humanity's habitable space, so his work is practical in nature."

traits.locale_text: 「タウ・フィ・0098はかつて、アストラ・ミリタラムに配属された専門家として旅を始めた。それが彼に刻まれたものだ。それ以来、彼の研究は、あらゆる惑星の自然や生物群系と戦うことに集中している。人類の居住可能な空間を拡大しようとする彼の仕事は、実用的なものだ。」
「タウ・フィ・0098はかつて、{g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}アストラ・ミリタラム{/g}に配属された専門家として旅を始めた。それが彼に刻まれたものだ。それ以来、彼の研究は、あらゆる惑星の自然や生物群系と戦うことに集中している。人類の居住可能な空間を拡大しようとする彼の仕事は、実用的なものだ」

languages.text: «Tau-Fi-0098 comenzó su viaje como especialista asignado al {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g}. Supongo que esa experiencia dejó su marca en él. Desde entonces, toda su investigación se ha centrado en combatir a la naturaleza y a las criaturas de varios planetas y biomas. Quiere expandir el espacio habitable de la Humanidad, así que su trabajo es totalmente práctico».
languages.original_text: "Tau-Phi-0098 once began his journey as a specialist assigned to the {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g}. I suppose that is what left its mark on him. Since then, all of his research has focused on combatting nature and the creatures of various planets and biomes. He is seeking to expand Humanity's habitable space, so his work is practical in nature."

traits.locale_text: «Tau-Fi-0098 comenzó su viaje como especialista asignado al {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g}. Supongo que esa experiencia dejó su marca en él. Desde entonces, toda su investigación se ha centrado en combatir a la naturaleza y a las criaturas de varios planetas y biomas. Quiere expandir el espacio habitable de la Humanidad, así que su trabajo es totalmente práctico».

languages.text: “陶-斐-0098起初是配属给{g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}星界军{/g}的专家。我想这段经历给他留下的影响深远。此后，他的研究全都围绕着如何对抗自然，以及各个星球与生物群系中的危险生物开展。他致力于拓展人类宜居的疆域，因此，他的研究极具实用性。”
languages.original_text: "Tau-Phi-0098 once began his journey as a specialist assigned to the {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g}. I suppose that is what left its mark on him. Since then, all of his research has focused on combatting nature and the creatures of various planets and biomes. He is seeking to expand Humanity's habitable space, so his work is practical in nature."

traits.locale_text: “陶-斐-0098起初是配属给{g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}星界军{/g}的专家。我想这段经历给他留下的影响深远。此后，他的研究全都围绕着如何对抗自然，以及各个星球与生物群系中的危险生物开展。他致力于拓展人类宜居的疆域，因此，他的研究极具实用性。”

languages.text: "Tau-Phi-0098 begann seine Reise einst als Spezialist im Dienst des {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g}. Ich denke, das hat ihn geprägt. Seitdem konzentriert sich seine gesamte Forschung auf die Bekämpfung der Natur und der Kreaturen verschiedener Planeten und Biome. Da er den Lebensraum der Menschheit erweitern will, ist seine Arbeit praktischer Natur."
languages.original_text: "Tau-Phi-0098 once began his journey as a specialist assigned to the {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g}. I suppose that is what left its mark on him. Since then, all of his research has focused on combatting nature and the creatures of various planets and biomes. He is seeking to expand Humanity's habitable space, so his work is practical in nature."

traits.locale_text: "Tau-Phi-0098 begann seine Reise einst als Spezialist im Dienst des {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g}. Ich denke, das hat ihn geprägt. Seitdem konzentriert sich seine gesamte Forschung auf die Bekämpfung der Natur und der Kreaturen verschiedener Planeten und Biome. Da er den Lebensraum der Menschheit erweitern will, ist seine Arbeit praktischer Natur."

languages.text: "Tau-Fi-0098, yolculuğuna bir zamanlar {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum'a{/g} atanan bir uzman olarak başlamış. Sanırım onda iz bırakan da bu olmuş. O zamandan beri araştırmaları, doğayla ve çeşitli gezegenlerin ve biyomların yaratıklarıyla savaşmaya odaklanmış. İnsanlığın yaşanabilir alanını genişletmeye çalışıyor. Bu yüzden çalışmaları, doğaları gereği oldukça pratik."
languages.original_text: "Tau-Phi-0098 once began his journey as a specialist assigned to the {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g}. I suppose that is what left its mark on him. Since then, all of his research has focused on combatting nature and the creatures of various planets and biomes. He is seeking to expand Humanity's habitable space, so his work is practical in nature."

traits.locale_text: "Tau-Fi-0098, yolculuğuna bir zamanlar {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum'a{/g} atanan bir uzman olarak başlamış. Sanırım onda iz bırakan da bu olmuş. O zamandan beri araştırmaları, doğayla ve çeşitli gezegenlerin ve biyomların yaratıklarıyla savaşmaya odaklanmış. İnsanlığın yaşanabilir alanını genişletmeye çalışıyor. Bu yüzden çalışmaları, doğaları gereği oldukça pratik."

languages.text: « Tau-Phi-0098 a fait ses armes en tant que spécialiste assigné à l'{g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g}. J'imagine que cette expérience l'a marqué durablement. Depuis, toutes ses recherches se concentrent sur la lutte contre la nature et les créatures de différents biomes et planètes. Son but est d'étendre le territoire habitable de l'humanité. Son travail est donc de nature pratique. »
languages.original_text: "Tau-Phi-0098 once began his journey as a specialist assigned to the {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g}. I suppose that is what left its mark on him. Since then, all of his research has focused on combatting nature and the creatures of various planets and biomes. He is seeking to expand Humanity's habitable space, so his work is practical in nature."
